content.query:
traces
| where message == "TokenUsage"
| extend projectName = tostring(customDimensions["project-name"])
| extend promptTokens = todouble(customDimensions["prompt-tokens"]),
         completionTokens = todouble(customDimensions["completion-tokens"])
| summarize PromptTokens = sum(promptTokens), CompletionTokens = sum(completionTokens) by projectName
| order by projectName asc
content.title: Total Token Usage by Project

content.query:
let pricing = datatable(modelBase:string, inputPrice:real, outputPrice:real)[
  'gpt-4o', 2.50, 10.00,
  'gpt-5.2', 1.75, 14.00,
  'gpt-5.4', 2.50, 15.00,
  'text-embedding-3-large', 0.156, 0.0
];
traces
| where message == "TokenUsage"
| extend projectName = tostring(customDimensions["project-name"]),
         model = tostring(customDimensions["model"]),
         promptTokens = todouble(customDimensions["prompt-tokens"]),
         completionTokens = todouble(customDimensions["completion-tokens"])
| extend modelBase = case(
    model startswith 'gpt-4o', 'gpt-4o',
    model startswith 'gpt-5.2', 'gpt-5.2',
    model startswith 'gpt-5.4', 'gpt-5.4',
    model startswith 'text-embedding-3-large', 'text-embedding-3-large',
    model)
| lookup pricing on modelBase
| extend InputCost = promptTokens * inputPrice / 1000000,
         OutputCost = completionTokens * outputPrice / 1000000
| summarize InputCost_USD = round(sum(InputCost), 4), OutputCost_USD = round(sum(OutputCost), 4) by projectName
| order by projectName asc
content.title: Estimated Cost by Project (USD)

content.query:
traces
| where message == "TokenUsage"
| extend projectName = tostring(customDimensions["project-name"])
| extend totalTokens = todouble(customDimensions["total-tokens"])
| summarize TotalTokens = sum(totalTokens) by bin(timestamp, 1d), projectName
| order by timestamp asc
content.title: Daily Trend by Project

content.query:
traces
| where message == "TokenUsage"
| extend model = tostring(customDimensions["model"])
| extend totalTokens = todouble(customDimensions["total-tokens"])
| summarize TotalTokens = sum(totalTokens) by model
| order by TotalTokens desc
content.title: Usage by Model

content.query:
traces
| where message == "TokenUsage"
| extend subscriber = tostring(customDimensions["subscriber"])
| extend promptTokens = todouble(customDimensions["prompt-tokens"]),
         completionTokens = todouble(customDimensions["completion-tokens"])
| summarize PromptTokens = sum(promptTokens), CompletionTokens = sum(completionTokens) by subscriber
| order by subscriber asc
content.title: Total Token Usage by User

content.query:
let pricing = datatable(modelBase:string, inputPrice:real, outputPrice:real)[
  'gpt-4o', 2.50, 10.00,
  'gpt-5.2', 1.75, 14.00,
  'gpt-5.4', 2.50, 15.00,
  'text-embedding-3-large', 0.156, 0.0
];
traces
| where message == "TokenUsage"
| extend subscriber = tostring(customDimensions["subscriber"]),
         model = tostring(customDimensions["model"]),
         promptTokens = todouble(customDimensions["prompt-tokens"]),
         completionTokens = todouble(customDimensions["completion-tokens"])
| extend modelBase = case(
    model startswith 'gpt-4o', 'gpt-4o',
    model startswith 'gpt-5.2', 'gpt-5.2',
    model startswith 'gpt-5.4', 'gpt-5.4',
    model startswith 'text-embedding-3-large', 'text-embedding-3-large',
    model)
| lookup pricing on modelBase
| extend InputCost = promptTokens * inputPrice / 1000000,
         OutputCost = completionTokens * outputPrice / 1000000
| summarize InputCost_USD = round(sum(InputCost), 4), OutputCost_USD = round(sum(OutputCost), 4) by subscriber
| order by subscriber asc
content.title: Estimated Cost by User (USD)

content.query:
let pricing = datatable(modelBase:string, inputPrice:real, outputPrice:real)[
  'gpt-4o', 2.50, 10.00,
  'gpt-5.2', 1.75, 14.00,
  'gpt-5.4', 2.50, 15.00,
  'text-embedding-3-large', 0.156, 0.0
];
traces
| where message == "TokenUsage"
| extend subscriber = tostring(customDimensions["subscriber"]),
         model = tostring(customDimensions["model"]),
         promptTokens = todouble(customDimensions["prompt-tokens"]),
         completionTokens = todouble(customDimensions["completion-tokens"]),
         totalTokens = todouble(customDimensions["total-tokens"])
| extend modelBase = case(
    model startswith 'gpt-4o', 'gpt-4o',
    model startswith 'gpt-5.2', 'gpt-5.2',
    model startswith 'gpt-5.4', 'gpt-5.4',
    model startswith 'text-embedding-3-large', 'text-embedding-3-large',
    model)
| lookup pricing on modelBase
| extend cost = (promptTokens * inputPrice + completionTokens * outputPrice) / 1000000
| summarize PromptTokens = sum(promptTokens),
            CompletionTokens = sum(completionTokens),
            TotalTokens = sum(totalTokens),
            EstimatedCost_USD = round(sum(cost), 4)
         by subscriber
| order by EstimatedCost_USD desc
content.title: Token Usage and Cost by User

content.query:
let pricing = datatable(modelBase:string, inputPrice:real, outputPrice:real)[
  'gpt-4o', 2.50, 10.00,
  'gpt-5.2', 1.75, 14.00,
  'gpt-5.4', 2.50, 15.00,
  'text-embedding-3-large', 0.156, 0.0
];
traces
| where message == "TokenUsage"
| extend projectName = tostring(customDimensions["project-name"]),
         model = tostring(customDimensions["model"]),
         promptTokens = todouble(customDimensions["prompt-tokens"]),
         completionTokens = todouble(customDimensions["completion-tokens"]),
         totalTokens = todouble(customDimensions["total-tokens"])
| extend modelBase = case(
    model startswith 'gpt-4o', 'gpt-4o',
    model startswith 'gpt-5.2', 'gpt-5.2',
    model startswith 'gpt-5.4', 'gpt-5.4',
    model startswith 'text-embedding-3-large', 'text-embedding-3-large',
    model)
| lookup pricing on modelBase
| extend cost = (promptTokens * inputPrice + completionTokens * outputPrice) / 1000000
| summarize PromptTokens = sum(promptTokens),
            CompletionTokens = sum(completionTokens),
            TotalTokens = sum(totalTokens),
            EstimatedCost_USD = round(sum(cost), 4)
         by projectName
| order by EstimatedCost_USD desc
content.title: Token Usage and Cost by Project

content.query:
let pricing = datatable(modelBase:string, inputPrice:real, outputPrice:real)[
  'gpt-4o', 2.50, 10.00,
  'gpt-5.2', 1.75, 14.00,
  'gpt-5.4', 2.50, 15.00,
  'text-embedding-3-large', 0.156, 0.0
];
traces
| where message == "TokenUsage"
| extend model = tostring(customDimensions["model"]),
         projectName = tostring(customDimensions["project-name"]),
         promptTokens = todouble(customDimensions["prompt-tokens"]),
         completionTokens = todouble(customDimensions["completion-tokens"]),
         totalTokens = todouble(customDimensions["total-tokens"])
| extend modelBase = extract(@'^([a-zA-Z]+-[\w.]+-?[\d.]*)', 1, model)
| extend modelBase = case(
    modelBase startswith 'gpt-4o', 'gpt-4o',
    modelBase startswith 'gpt-5.2', 'gpt-5.2',
    modelBase startswith 'gpt-5.4', 'gpt-5.4',
    modelBase startswith 'text-embedding-3-large', 'text-embedding-3-large',
    model)
| summarize PromptTokens = sum(promptTokens),
            CompletionTokens = sum(completionTokens),
            TotalTokens = sum(totalTokens)
         by projectName, model, modelBase
| lookup pricing on modelBase
| extend EstimatedCost_USD = round((PromptTokens * inputPrice + CompletionTokens * outputPrice) / 1000000, 4)
| project projectName, model, PromptTokens, CompletionTokens, TotalTokens, EstimatedCost_USD
| order by EstimatedCost_USD desc
content.title: Token Usage and Estimated Cost by Project and Model

content.query:
datatable(Model:string, Direction:string, Price_per_1M_tokens:real, Currency:string)[
  'gpt-4o', 'Input', 2.50, 'USD',
  'gpt-4o', 'Output', 10.00, 'USD',
  'gpt-5.2', 'Input', 1.75, 'USD',
  'gpt-5.2', 'Output', 14.00, 'USD',
  'gpt-5.4', 'Input', 2.50, 'USD',
  'gpt-5.4', 'Output', 15.00, 'USD',
  'text-embedding-3-large', 'Input', 0.156, 'USD'
]
| order by Model asc, Direction asc
content.title: Model Pricing (Azure Retail Prices)
